# Las Secoyas SPA

> Premium wedding and events center for sale in Calera de Tango, Chile. Turnkey investment opportunity with 16 years of continuous operation.

## About

Las Secoyas SPA is a fully operational wedding and events venue located at Camino Lonquén Norte 12180, Paradero 8, Calera de Tango, Región Metropolitana, Chile. The business has operated for 16 years and is being offered for sale as a turnkey investment at UF 50,000, with a property appraisal of UF 79,000.

## Key Facts

- **Asking price:** UF 50,000 (property appraised at UF 79,000)
- **Projected ROI:** 22.2% annual
- **Annual revenue:** CLP 20,061 million (average)
- **Annual net profit:** CLP 8,248 million (average)
- **Capacity:** 300 guests
- **Years of operation:** 16
- **Awards:** 10 Wedding Awards from Matrimonios.cl
- **Rating:** 4.9 / 5 on Matrimonios.cl
- **Location:** Calera de Tango, 30 minutes from Santiago city center

## What Is Included

The sale includes the property, brand, operating licenses, supplier relationships, and ongoing event bookings. The venue continues to operate normally while seeking a new owner.

- Website: https://inmejorableinversiongastronomica.com/

- Location: Calera de Tango, Chile
